mapper.sql: series_id , user_id, series_title, about_text, approval_status, is_delete, update_time, update_user, create_time, create_user
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_series (user_id, series_title, about_text, approval_status, is_delete, update_time, update_user, create_time, create_user) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{series_title}, #{about_text}, #{approval_status}, 0, #{update_time}, #{update_user}, #{create_time}, #{create_user})
mapper.select:
SELECT s.series_id, s.user_id, s.series_title, s.about_text, s.update_time, s.update_user, s.create_time, s.create_user, (SELECT w.thumb_url FROM tb_works w WHERE w.series_id = s.series_id AND w.is_delete = 0 AND w.approval_status = 10 ORDER BY w.create_time DESC LIMIT 1) AS thumb_url FROM tb_series s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_delete = 0 AND s.approval_status = 10
AND (s.series_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.about_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY
CASE WHEN s.series_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
s.create_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_series SET approval_status = #{approvalStatus}, update_time = NOW(), update_user = #{userId} WHERE is_delete = 0 AND series_id IN
#{seriesId}
